arts.ttl: Derby County survival bid hits buffers as winning run ends
arts.sum: Derby's fight for survival under new boss John Eustace hit the buffers as their four-match winning streak was ended by a 80th-minute goal from Swansea's Eom Ji-sung to earn the home side a 1-0 win. arts.ttl: Alan Sheehan addresses Jerry Yates' Swansea City future as Derby County striker misses reunion
arts.sum: Yates, who joined the Rams on loan from the Swans in July, is not eligible to face his parent club, which means the visitors will have to make at least one change to a team that has won four consecutive league matches. Swansea City will make a decision on Jerry Yates’ future in the summer, as the Derby County striker is set to sit out this weekend’s Championship fixture.
